_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of AI application security risks, including prompt injection, jailbreaking, data exfiltration via LLM outputs, and model supply chain vulnerabilities.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI SP domain. SP-K-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-K-012 (SP, cosine: 0.385), SP-T-001 (SP, cosine: 0.378).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.1/10 (raw 0.310). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [malware, ttps] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, application, chain, data, exfiltration, injection] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.861 (P=0.879, R=0.844). P exceeds R by 0.035 — the DCWF element's 4 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 20 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (87.8%). "Knowledge of Malware TTPs" and "Knowledge of AI application security risks, including prompt injection, jailbrea" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.436 > STS 0.310 (gap +0.126). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [knowledge] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.1%. Shared tokens: [knowledge]. DCWF-only: [malware, ttps]. WIDAI-only: [ai, application, chain, data, exfiltration, injection].

signals.detail: Bi-encoder/STS gap 0.126 suggests some vocabulary-driven inflation in candidate selection.
